title: CLI: add parity checks for global flags across every subcommand
observed_gap: Global flags such as verbosity, output format, and config handling are exercised unevenly across command tests, so regressions can land in less-used subcommands.
requested_outcome: Add a focused parity test matrix that invokes every public subcommand with supported global flags and verifies either accepted behavior or a clear unsupported-flag error.
completion_criteria: Every documented global flag has coverage across command groups; unsupported combinations fail with actionable messages; README/manpage examples remain accurate.

title: CLI: report the resolved config file path in verbose mode
observed_gap: Config-driven runs do not consistently show which `.soroban-debug.toml` file was loaded, making workspace-level debugging harder when multiple configs exist.
requested_outcome: Show the resolved config path, source precedence, and ignored config locations when verbose logging is enabled.
completion_criteria: Verbose output identifies the config source; missing configs remain quiet by default; tests cover explicit and discovered config paths.

title: CLI: add a config validation command that exits without running a session
observed_gap: Users can discover invalid config only after starting a debug, scenario, or remote command.
requested_outcome: Add `soroban-debug config check` or equivalent validation that parses config, validates keys, and reports deprecations.
completion_criteria: Valid configs exit 0; unknown keys and type errors include line/field context; docs mention the command near config examples.

title: CLI: standardize unknown argument suggestions for nested commands
observed_gap: Unknown-flag errors differ between command paths, and some do not suggest the closest supported flag.
requested_outcome: Route nested command parsing through a consistent suggestion helper.
completion_criteria: Unknown flags produce consistent wording; closest matches are shown when edit distance is useful; tests cover at least three command groups.

title: CLI: make dry-run output explicit about skipped side effects
observed_gap: Dry-run mode can be mistaken for a real execution because skipped writes, exports, or network calls are not summarized consistently.
requested_outcome: Add a dry-run summary listing the operations that would have run and the outputs that were intentionally skipped.
completion_criteria: Dry-run summaries are present for affected commands; real runs do not include dry-run wording; docs include one dry-run example.

title: CLI: add shell-completion regression tests for new subcommands
observed_gap: Generated completions can fall behind when new commands or flags are added.
requested_outcome: Add tests that check completion output contains all public command names and selected high-risk flags.
completion_criteria: Completion tests fail when public commands are missing; generated manpages and completions stay aligned; CI runs the check.

title: CLI: normalize exit codes for validation, runtime, and infrastructure failures
observed_gap: Exit codes are not documented as a stable contract, which makes automation around the debugger brittle.
requested_outcome: Define and implement an exit-code taxonomy for usage errors, contract failures, transport failures, and internal errors.
completion_criteria: Exit code meanings are documented; representative tests assert the mapped codes; existing scripts use the documented values.

title: CLI: show command examples in error output only when they are directly relevant
observed_gap: Some errors are terse while others risk overwhelming users with generic guidance.
requested_outcome: Add targeted remediation hints for common invocation mistakes without adding broad help text to every error.
completion_criteria: Common errors include one relevant next step; low-level parser errors remain concise; snapshot tests cover the wording.

title: CLI: support machine-readable `doctor` output for automation
observed_gap: `doctor` is useful in CI and bug reports, but automation needs structured output instead of terminal text.
requested_outcome: Add JSON output for `doctor`, including toolchain, fixture, network, and permission checks.
completion_criteria: Schema is documented; tests validate required fields; terminal output remains unchanged by default.

title: CLI: add a visible deprecation path for renamed flags
observed_gap: When flags are renamed or superseded, users need a warning period rather than sudden breakage.
requested_outcome: Add a deprecation registry that maps old flags to replacements and emits warnings before removal.
completion_criteria: Deprecated flags warn once per run; replacements are shown; tests cover warning text and eventual hard-fail behavior.

title: Output contracts: add golden tests for stable JSON field ordering
observed_gap: JSON consumers benefit from stable examples, but field ordering can drift and make docs/tests noisy.
requested_outcome: Introduce golden fixtures for key JSON outputs and normalize the serializer path used by CLI commands.
completion_criteria: Golden snapshots cover inspect, analyze, run, and upgrade-check; intentional field changes are easy to review; docs examples match snapshots.

title: Output contracts: validate error JSON against a schema
observed_gap: Error responses are part of the automation surface, but schema validation appears focused on successful outputs.
requested_outcome: Add a schema and tests for JSON error envelopes.
completion_criteria: Error JSON includes code, message, category, and optional context; schema tests cover validation and runtime failures; docs explain the envelope.

title: Output contracts: document stability levels for text, JSON, and trace outputs
observed_gap: The repo exposes multiple output formats, but users cannot tell which are stable API contracts and which are best-effort human text.
requested_outcome: Add a stability table covering terminal output, JSON command output, trace files, snapshots, and replay artifacts.
completion_criteria: Each output type has a stability level; breaking-change expectations are stated; release checklist references the policy.

title: Output contracts: add schema fixtures for minimal and maximal outputs
observed_gap: Schemas can pass with typical examples while missing optional edge cases.
requested_outcome: Add minimal and maximal fixture examples for each schema-backed output.
completion_criteria: Fixtures validate against schemas; optional fields are represented at least once; missing required fields fail in tests.

title: Output contracts: include `schema_version` in exported artifacts that lack it
observed_gap: Several exported files are consumed outside the immediate CLI run and need explicit version metadata.
requested_outcome: Audit exported traces, snapshots, replay bundles, and batch artifacts; add `schema_version` where missing.
completion_criteria: Every long-lived exported artifact carries a version; readers reject unsupported major versions clearly; docs list current versions.

title: Output contracts: add compatibility tests for reading older fixture versions
observed_gap: Schema evolution needs regression coverage for older artifacts kept in the repo.
requested_outcome: Add old-version fixture loading tests for trace, storage, replay, and scenario outputs.
completion_criteria: Old fixtures load or fail with documented migration errors; tests name the supported version window; docs mention migration limits.

title: Output contracts: make snapshot update workflow discoverable
observed_gap: Snapshot tests exist, but contributors may not know the approved command for refreshing expected output.
requested_outcome: Document and/or script the snapshot update flow used for JSON and integration snapshots.
completion_criteria: Contributors have one command or documented workflow; CI failure output points to it; docs-only contributors can understand when not to update snapshots.

title: Output contracts: add redaction rules for paths and environment values in JSON output
observed_gap: Structured output can leak local paths or tokens if not redacted consistently.
requested_outcome: Audit JSON-producing commands and centralize redaction for filesystem paths, environment-derived secrets, and remote tokens.
completion_criteria: Sensitive values are redacted in JSON and text output; tests cover representative secrets; users can still opt into verbose diagnostics safely.

title: Output contracts: add examples for consuming JSON with `jq` in CI
observed_gap: The docs describe JSON output but do not show practical automation snippets.
requested_outcome: Add short `jq` examples for extracting failures, budget deltas, and artifact paths.
completion_criteria: Examples run against checked-in fixtures; docs note stable fields; snippets avoid relying on terminal-only output.

title: Output contracts: add round-trip tests for storage snapshot import/export
observed_gap: Storage snapshots are both produced and consumed, so round-trip behavior should be locked down.
requested_outcome: Add tests that export a snapshot, re-import it, and compare normalized state.
completion_criteria: Round-trip tests cover simple and nested storage; normalization differences are documented; corrupted snapshots fail with clear errors.

title: Debugger: preserve breakpoint hit context in exported traces
observed_gap: Trace exports show execution flow but may not consistently mark why execution paused.
requested_outcome: Add pause-reason metadata for breakpoint hits, conditional breakpoints, step operations, and errors.
completion_criteria: Trace entries include pause reason where relevant; existing consumers handle absent fields; docs include one breakpoint trace example.

title: Debugger: add regression tests for stepping over host calls
observed_gap: Instruction stepping can behave differently around host calls and contract invocations.
requested_outcome: Add focused tests for step-in, step-over, and continue behavior around host call boundaries.
completion_criteria: Tests assert instruction pointer movement; host-call frames are represented consistently; failures include useful trace context.

title: Debugger: expose current source mapping confidence in session state
observed_gap: When source maps are partial, users need to know whether a displayed source location is exact or heuristic.
requested_outcome: Add confidence metadata to source-location reporting and surface it in CLI/extension protocol responses.
completion_criteria: Exact, heuristic, and unknown mappings are distinguishable; tests cover missing DWARF/source map cases; docs mention fallback behavior.

title: Debugger: add guardrails for infinite continue loops
observed_gap: A session can repeatedly stop at the same breakpoint or error without clear progress.
requested_outcome: Detect repeated identical pause states and offer a warning or loop-break hint.
completion_criteria: Repeated pause detection is bounded and deterministic; users can continue intentionally; tests cover repeated breakpoints.

title: Debugger: record call-stack depth limits in diagnostics
observed_gap: Deep or recursive contracts need predictable handling when stack capture is truncated.
requested_outcome: Add diagnostics when stack frames are truncated and document any configured depth limit.
completion_criteria: Truncated stacks include an explicit marker; limits are configurable or documented; tests cover truncation.

title: Debugger: add performance budget tests for trace-heavy sessions
observed_gap: Long trace sessions can regress in memory or runtime without a targeted benchmark.
requested_outcome: Add a trace-heavy benchmark or integration test with guardrails for allocations and runtime.
completion_criteria: Benchmark inputs are checked in; threshold behavior is documented; regressions produce actionable CI output.

title: Debugger: make conditional breakpoint evaluation errors visible
observed_gap: Evaluation failures for conditional breakpoints can look like skipped breakpoints.
requested_outcome: Surface parse/evaluation errors with breakpoint id and expression context.
completion_criteria: Invalid conditions fail clearly; valid false conditions remain quiet; tests cover parse and runtime errors.

title: Debugger: add timeline markers for storage mutations
observed_gap: Timeline views are more useful when storage-changing instructions are easy to identify.
requested_outcome: Add storage mutation markers to timeline records and any terminal summary that consumes them.
completion_criteria: Storage writes are marked without excessive payload size; filters can include/exclude them; docs mention the marker.

title: Debugger: preserve session metadata when replaying a trace
observed_gap: Replay should retain enough metadata to compare the original and replayed session.
requested_outcome: Carry command, contract, network, seed, and artifact metadata through replay flows where safe.
completion_criteria: Replay output includes original session metadata; sensitive values are redacted; tests cover metadata preservation.

title: Debugger: add deterministic ordering for reported findings
observed_gap: Analyzer and debugger findings should not reorder nondeterministically between identical runs.
requested_outcome: Sort findings by stable location, rule, and message keys before output.
completion_criteria: Repeated identical runs produce identical ordering; tests cover multiple findings; docs avoid promising semantic priority where only sort order exists.

title: Remote: add protocol version mismatch diagnostics
observed_gap: Remote client/server mismatches need a clear failure mode before debugging starts.
requested_outcome: Include both client and server protocol versions in handshake failures and remediation text.
completion_criteria: Mismatch errors show expected and actual versions; tests cover unsupported versions; docs include upgrade guidance.

title: Remote: add retry classification for transient transport errors
observed_gap: Remote commands should distinguish retryable transport failures from permanent request errors.
requested_outcome: Classify connection reset, timeout, auth, and protocol errors and apply retry policy only where appropriate.
completion_criteria: Retryable errors are retried with bounded backoff; permanent errors fail immediately; logs show retry count and reason.

title: Remote: redact authorization tokens from debug logs
observed_gap: Remote token handling needs explicit tests to prevent accidental log leaks.
requested_outcome: Add tests and centralized redaction for token values in logs, errors, JSON output, and panic paths.
completion_criteria: Token literals never appear in captured output; redacted placeholders remain useful; security docs mention the behavior.

title: Remote: add request cancellation tests for interrupted clients
observed_gap: Server-side cancellation behavior should be validated when a client disconnects mid-request.
requested_outcome: Add integration tests that disconnect during long-running remote operations and assert cleanup.
completion_criteria: Server releases session resources; partial artifacts are removed or marked incomplete; logs show cancellation cause.

title: Remote: document local port and firewall troubleshooting in one place
observed_gap: Remote troubleshooting is split across docs and examples, making common networking failures harder to resolve.
requested_outcome: Add a concise guide for port binding, loopback restrictions, firewall blocks, and SSH tunnel checks.
completion_criteria: Guide links from remote debugging and troubleshooting docs; commands are copyable; CI sandbox caveats are included.

title: Remote: add heartbeat timeout metrics to session summaries
observed_gap: Heartbeat failures are hard to diagnose after the fact.
requested_outcome: Record heartbeat interval, missed count, and timeout reason in session summaries.
completion_criteria: Summaries include heartbeat data for remote sessions; local sessions are unaffected; tests cover timeout summaries.

title: Remote: make server shutdown idempotent under repeated signals
observed_gap: Signal handling exists, but repeated shutdown signals should not produce double cleanup or noisy errors.
requested_outcome: Add tests and guards for repeated SIGINT/SIGTERM during active sessions.
completion_criteria: Repeated signals do not panic; cleanup runs once; final logs explain forced vs graceful shutdown.

title: Remote: add a preflight command for server reachability and auth
observed_gap: Users should be able to check remote reachability before launching a full debug session.
requested_outcome: Add a lightweight remote preflight command that validates host, protocol, auth, and capabilities.
completion_criteria: Successful preflight lists capabilities; failures are categorized; docs link it from remote setup.

title: Remote: cap concurrent sessions and report capacity errors clearly
observed_gap: The server should fail predictably when concurrency limits are reached.
requested_outcome: Add a configurable session limit and a structured capacity error.
completion_criteria: Limit is documented; tests cover limit reached and released capacity; error includes retry guidance.

title: Remote: add fixtures for protocol error responses
observed_gap: Protocol error paths should be testable without live remote infrastructure.
requested_outcome: Add protocol-level fixtures for malformed requests, unsupported commands, auth failures, and timeout responses.
completion_criteria: Fixtures are used by client tests; protocol docs mention error shape; malformed fixtures fail schema validation.

title: Plugins: add deterministic plugin load ordering
observed_gap: When multiple plugins are configured, load order should be stable and explainable.
requested_outcome: Sort plugins by explicit priority and path/name fallback, and document the order.
completion_criteria: Identical configs load in the same order; conflicts mention both plugins; tests cover priority and fallback ordering.

title: Plugins: validate plugin manifests before any dynamic loading
observed_gap: Manifest errors should be rejected before code loading or execution begins.
requested_outcome: Add a manifest validation phase that checks required fields, schema version, command declarations, and sandbox policy.
completion_criteria: Invalid manifests fail early; errors include plugin path and field; tests cover missing and unsupported fields.

title: Plugins: expose plugin health in session summaries
observed_gap: Users need to know which plugins loaded, failed, or were disabled during a session.
requested_outcome: Add plugin health entries to session summaries and optional JSON output.
completion_criteria: Summary lists loaded, skipped, failed, and circuit-broken plugins; sensitive paths are redacted where needed; tests cover each status.

title: Plugins: add policy tests for environment variable allowlists
observed_gap: Plugin trust policy mentions environment variables, but allowlist behavior needs executable coverage.
requested_outcome: Add tests that verify allowed, denied, and redacted environment variables for plugin execution.
completion_criteria: Denied variables are unavailable; logs avoid leaking values; docs include one policy example.

title: Plugins: provide a migration guide for manifest schema changes
observed_gap: Plugin authors need upgrade guidance when manifest schema or API versions change.
requested_outcome: Add a migration section mapping old fields to new fields and explaining compatibility errors.
completion_criteria: Guide covers current schema transitions; compatibility checks link to it; example plugin is updated.

title: Plugins: add timeout diagnostics for slow event handlers
observed_gap: Slow plugin hooks can make the debugger feel hung without clear attribution.
requested_outcome: Measure plugin hook duration and report timeout/slow-handler warnings with plugin name and event type.
completion_criteria: Timeouts include plugin and hook metadata; thresholds are configurable or documented; tests cover slow handler simulation.

title: Plugins: add contract tests for custom command registration
observed_gap: Custom commands need stable behavior around names, args, conflicts, and help output.
requested_outcome: Add tests for registering commands, rejecting conflicts, and rendering plugin-provided help.
completion_criteria: Conflicts fail deterministically; help output includes plugin command metadata; examples stay in sync.

title: Plugins: retain crash reports as structured artifacts
observed_gap: Plugin crash isolation is more useful when crash details can be attached to issues.
requested_outcome: Write structured crash artifacts with plugin metadata, event, backtrace availability, and redacted environment details.
completion_criteria: Crash artifacts are stored in a documented location; users can disable retention; tests cover redaction and cleanup.

title: Plugins: add `plugin list` output for installed and configured plugins
observed_gap: Users currently need to inspect config files to understand the active plugin set.
requested_outcome: Add a command that lists discovered plugins, configured plugins, load status, and manifest metadata.
completion_criteria: Text and JSON outputs are supported; invalid plugins are shown with errors; docs include example output.

title: Plugins: document sandbox threat model and non-goals
observed_gap: The sandbox policy should make clear what it protects against and what it does not.
requested_outcome: Add a short threat model covering filesystem, environment, network, command execution, and trusted plugin assumptions.
completion_criteria: Threat model links from plugin docs; policy examples align with implementation; security limitations are explicit.

title: VS Code: add command palette entries for common debugger workflows
observed_gap: Common workflows may require manually editing launch configs or invoking CLI commands outside the extension.
requested_outcome: Add command palette actions for validate config, open docs, run preflight, and attach to remote.
completion_criteria: Commands appear with consistent names; each reports progress/failure; package manifest and tests are updated.

title: VS Code: add quick fixes for missing WASM artifact paths
observed_gap: Launch failures for missing artifacts should offer direct remediation.
requested_outcome: Detect missing or invalid artifact paths and offer quick fixes to browse, build fixtures, or update `launch.json`.
completion_criteria: Quick fixes update launch config safely; errors remain clear without quick fix support; tests cover missing path diagnostics.

title: VS Code: preserve user breakpoints when source maps refresh
observed_gap: Refreshing source maps or rebuilding contracts should not silently drop breakpoints.
requested_outcome: Track breakpoint source identity and remap where possible after source map changes.
completion_criteria: Breakpoints survive rebuilds when mapping is still valid; stale breakpoints are marked; tests cover remap and stale cases.

title: VS Code: add a session diagnostics export command
observed_gap: When users report extension bugs, maintainers need consistent diagnostics.
requested_outcome: Add an export command that collects extension version, CLI version, launch config, recent logs, and redacted paths/tokens.
completion_criteria: Export is redacted by default; users choose output location; docs mention attaching it to issues.

title: VS Code: add timeout handling around adapter startup
observed_gap: Adapter startup failures can appear as generic debug launch failures.
requested_outcome: Add explicit timeout errors for CLI process startup, protocol handshake, and first stopped event.
completion_criteria: Timeout errors name the phase; settings expose timeout values where appropriate; tests simulate slow startup.

title: VS Code: show storage snapshot import status in the debug UI
observed_gap: When a launch config uses snapshot input, users should see whether it loaded successfully.
requested_outcome: Surface snapshot path, loaded key count, and validation warnings in a debug UI panel or session summary.
completion_criteria: Valid snapshots show summary data; invalid snapshots link to errors; no sensitive values are displayed.

title: VS Code: add fixture-backed tests for variables view edge cases
observed_gap: Variable rendering can regress for nested values, large vectors, and unavailable source maps.
requested_outcome: Add extension tests using checked-in fixtures for nested values, large collections, and missing source context.
completion_criteria: Variables display stable labels; pagination/expansion is covered; tests run in the extension CI path.

title: VS Code: add remote attach discovery from recent sessions
observed_gap: Remote attach configs are easier to use when recent hosts can be reused.
requested_outcome: Store recent remote hosts/workspaces and expose them through a pick list.
completion_criteria: Recent entries are bounded; sensitive tokens are never stored; docs mention how to clear history.

title: VS Code: handle CLI binary version drift with an actionable prompt
observed_gap: Extension behavior depends on the installed CLI version.
requested_outcome: Detect unsupported or mismatched CLI versions and prompt users to update or select a binary path.
completion_criteria: Mismatch prompt includes detected and required versions; users can configure binary path; tests cover version parsing.

title: VS Code: add trace viewer filters for event type and contract id
observed_gap: Trace viewing becomes noisy for larger sessions without filtering.
requested_outcome: Add filters for event type, contract id, call depth, and errors in the trace viewer.
completion_criteria: Filters update without reloading the trace; empty results are clear; tests cover filter state.

title: Docs: add a command-to-documentation coverage table
observed_gap: Public commands, manpages, feature docs, and tutorials can drift independently.
requested_outcome: Add a table mapping each command to its manpage, reference doc, tutorial, and feature-matrix row.
completion_criteria: Every public command has entries or explicit N/A; links are checked; contributor docs explain how to update the table.

title: Docs: add troubleshooting entries for malformed WASM artifacts
observed_gap: Users encountering invalid or incompatible WASM need focused remediation guidance.
requested_outcome: Add troubleshooting entries for missing exports, invalid custom sections, unsupported metadata, and build-target mismatches.
completion_criteria: Entries include symptoms and fixes; inspect docs link to them; examples avoid project-specific paths.

title: Docs: add a glossary for Soroban debugger terms
observed_gap: Terms such as trace, replay, snapshot, host call, budget, and source map appear across docs without one canonical glossary.
requested_outcome: Add a glossary page and link first-use terms from key docs.
completion_criteria: Glossary covers core terms; docs link to it from getting started and architecture; wording stays user-facing.

title: Docs: add a maintainer guide for triaging debugger issues
observed_gap: Issue triage depends on consistent labels, reproduction data, and ownership.
requested_outcome: Add a maintainer-facing triage guide for bugs, feature requests, docs gaps, and extension reports.
completion_criteria: Guide references labels and templates; reproduction checklist is included; contribution docs link to public-facing parts.

title: Docs: add a release note checklist for output contract changes
observed_gap: Changes to JSON, trace, and schema outputs need explicit release notes.
requested_outcome: Add release checklist steps and examples for documenting output contract changes.
completion_criteria: Checklist names affected artifacts; changelog examples are included; CI or PR template asks about output contracts.

title: Docs: add an end-to-end CI automation tutorial
observed_gap: CI users need a recipe that runs debug/analyze, captures artifacts, and fails on actionable conditions.
requested_outcome: Add a tutorial using GitHub Actions or shell scripts to run debugger commands in CI.
completion_criteria: Tutorial includes install, cache, command, artifact upload, and failure examples; commands are tested or fixture-backed.

title: Docs: document supported platforms and shell assumptions
observed_gap: Scripts, manpage tooling, and examples may assume Unix utilities without stating platform expectations.
requested_outcome: Add a support matrix for macOS, Linux, Windows, and WSL, including known limitations.
completion_criteria: Matrix links from contributing and install docs; Windows-specific caveats are explicit; CI coverage is described.

title: Docs: add a guide for minimizing reproducible bug reports
observed_gap: Maintainers need small contracts, fixture artifacts, and command output to reproduce issues quickly.
requested_outcome: Add a bug-report minimization guide for reducing contracts, redacting data, and attaching artifacts.
completion_criteria: Guide links from issue template; includes commands for collecting versions and artifacts; redaction warnings are included.

title: Docs: add diagrams for local, remote, and VS Code debug flows
observed_gap: Architecture docs are text-heavy and make it hard to compare supported flows.
requested_outcome: Add lightweight diagrams showing process boundaries, protocol flow, artifacts, and failure points.
completion_criteria: Diagrams live in source-controlled docs; captions explain artifacts; links from architecture and VS Code docs are added.

title: Docs: add a documentation freshness checklist for dependency upgrades
observed_gap: Dependency updates can change CLI behavior, host APIs, or supported contracts without docs updates.
requested_outcome: Add a checklist tied to dependency upgrades covering docs, examples, schemas, and fixtures.
completion_criteria: Checklist is referenced by contributing docs; examples include `soroban-env-host`; PR template asks about it.

title: CI: split fast CLI tests from slower integration and fixture tests
observed_gap: Developers need quick feedback while still keeping full coverage in CI.
requested_outcome: Add named test groups or scripts for fast CLI tests, integration tests, fixture rebuild tests, and extension tests.
completion_criteria: Docs list which command to run locally; CI names match docs; full test suite still runs before merge.

title: CI: add a docs link checker with an allowlist for generated anchors
observed_gap: Docs contain many cross-links and anchors that can drift.
requested_outcome: Add a link-check job with explicit allowlist rules for generated or external links.
completion_criteria: Broken internal links fail CI; allowlist is documented; generated anchors are handled consistently.

title: CI: cache Rust and VS Code dependencies with clear invalidation keys
observed_gap: CI runtime can drift if cache keys are ad hoc or undocumented.
requested_outcome: Define cache keys based on lockfiles and toolchain versions for Rust, fixtures, and extension dependencies.
completion_criteria: CI logs show cache hit/miss; cache keys change on relevant lockfile updates; docs mention local cache expectations.

title: CI: add a job that verifies generated files are committed
observed_gap: Generated manpages, schemas, completions, and extension metadata should not drift from sources.
requested_outcome: Add a CI job that regenerates known generated outputs and fails on diff.
completion_criteria: Job names generated files; local regeneration command is documented; docs-only changes are not blocked unnecessarily.

title: CI: add flaky-test quarantine guidance and tracking
observed_gap: Intermittent tests need a process that preserves visibility instead of silent skips.
requested_outcome: Document and enforce a quarantine label or tracking issue requirement for ignored flaky tests.
completion_criteria: Ignored tests include tracking references; CI summary lists quarantined tests; contributor docs explain the process.

title: CI: add fixture rebuild smoke tests on supported platforms
observed_gap: Fixture build scripts differ by platform and can break outside the main developer machine.
requested_outcome: Run a minimal fixture rebuild smoke test on supported OS targets.
completion_criteria: Smoke tests cover at least one contract fixture; platform failures include setup guidance; docs link to fixture build instructions.

title: CI: publish test artifact summaries for failed integration runs
observed_gap: Failed integration tests are easier to debug when traces, logs, and snapshots are uploaded.
requested_outcome: Add artifact upload for failed integration runs with redaction and retention settings.
completion_criteria: Artifacts are uploaded only on failure or explicit debug runs; sensitive values are redacted; CI summary links to artifacts.

title: CI: add property-test seeds to failure output
observed_gap: Property test failures need reproducible seeds in CI logs.
requested_outcome: Ensure every property or randomized test reports seed and replay command on failure.
completion_criteria: Failure output includes seed; docs explain rerun command; tests verify seed plumbing where practical.

title: CI: enforce minimum supported Rust version explicitly
observed_gap: The repo should state and test its MSRV if downstream users depend on it.
requested_outcome: Add an MSRV policy and CI job, or explicitly document that only stable latest is supported.
completion_criteria: Policy is documented; CI matches the policy; dependency updates consider MSRV impact.

title: CI: add concurrency cancellation for superseded pull request runs
observed_gap: Superseded CI runs can waste minutes and delay feedback.
requested_outcome: Add workflow concurrency groups that cancel older runs for the same branch where safe.
completion_criteria: PR pushes cancel superseded runs; release/tag workflows are not canceled incorrectly; workflow docs mention the behavior.

title: Examples: add a minimal contract intentionally missing debug symbols
observed_gap: Source-map fallback behavior needs an example users can inspect.
requested_outcome: Add an example WASM/contract or fixture built without debug symbols and document expected debugger behavior.
completion_criteria: Example is reproducible; tests cover fallback output; docs link from source-level debugging.

title: Examples: add a cross-contract failure fixture with mock isolation
observed_gap: Cross-contract debugging is hard to learn without a focused failing example.
requested_outcome: Add a fixture showing a cross-contract call failure and how mocks isolate the dependency.
completion_criteria: Example includes expected failure and fixed path; docs link to it; tests keep fixture behavior stable.

title: Examples: add a large storage snapshot fixture for pagination and filtering
observed_gap: Storage UI and CLI filtering need realistic large-state examples.
requested_outcome: Add a generated large snapshot fixture with documented shape and regeneration command.
completion_criteria: Fixture stays small enough for git; tests use it for pagination/filtering; docs explain the dataset.

title: Examples: add an oracle contract scenario that demonstrates stale data debugging
observed_gap: The oracle example has tests, but a debugger scenario would show time-sensitive state behavior.
requested_outcome: Add a scenario file and tutorial notes for debugging stale oracle prices.
completion_criteria: Scenario runs from documented command; trace shows stale-data branch; docs link from scenario cookbook.

title: Examples: add failure-oriented snapshots for auth errors
observed_gap: Auth debugging is easier with artifacts that reproduce common authorization failures.
requested_outcome: Add snapshots/fixtures for missing authorization, wrong invoker, and repeated auth attempts.
completion_criteria: Fixtures are documented; tests assert expected error classes; tutorial references the fixtures.

title: Examples: add a benchmark fixture that exercises budget-heavy loops
observed_gap: Performance docs and benchmarks should share a reproducible workload.
requested_outcome: Add or document a fixture that intentionally stresses CPU/memory budgets.
completion_criteria: Benchmark uses the fixture; docs explain expected budget profile; guardrails prevent excessive runtime.

title: Examples: add plugin examples for command, event, and policy hooks
observed_gap: The current example plugin should demonstrate each supported extension point clearly.
requested_outcome: Add separate or expanded examples for custom commands, event hooks, and sandbox policy.
completion_criteria: Each example has README instructions; plugin tests cover them; plugin docs link to the examples.

title: Examples: add a fixture manifest validator for artifact metadata
observed_gap: The fixture manifest should be checked for stale paths, hashes, and expected exports.
requested_outcome: Add a validation command or test that verifies every manifest entry points to a valid artifact and metadata.
completion_criteria: Invalid manifest entries fail with clear messages; hashes are checked; docs describe updating the manifest.

title: Examples: add end-to-end replay artifacts for a known regression
observed_gap: Replay documentation benefits from a checked-in artifact that demonstrates the full workflow.
requested_outcome: Add a small replay bundle and expected replay output for a fixed regression.
completion_criteria: Replay artifact is versioned; tests ensure it still loads; docs use it as the canonical replay example.

title: Examples: document which examples are safe for quick CI runs
observed_gap: Some examples may be too slow or environment-sensitive for every PR.
requested_outcome: Add metadata or docs classifying examples as quick, integration, benchmark, or manual.
completion_criteria: Example index includes category and runtime expectation; CI scripts use the category; contributors know where to add new examples.

title: Security: add a secret-scanning checklist for debug artifacts
observed_gap: Debug artifacts can include user inputs, storage values, environment details, or tokens.
requested_outcome: Add a checklist and redaction tests for artifacts produced by debug, remote, replay, and extension flows.
completion_criteria: Known sensitive fields are redacted; docs warn users before sharing artifacts; tests cover representative secrets.

title: Security: add dependency audit guidance for release preparation
observed_gap: Release prep should include dependency vulnerability checks with documented triage.
requested_outcome: Add release checklist steps for `cargo audit` or chosen audit tooling and npm audit handling.
completion_criteria: Commands and triage rules are documented; failures have waiver guidance; release docs identify responsible owner.

title: Reliability: add bounded cleanup for temporary files after failed runs
observed_gap: Failed runs can leave temporary artifacts or partial exports without clear cleanup behavior.
requested_outcome: Audit temp-file creation and ensure cleanup or explicit retention messaging.
completion_criteria: Temp files are cleaned on normal failure; retained files are listed; tests cover interrupted export paths where practical.

title: Performance: add benchmark baselines for source-map loading
observed_gap: Source-map loading can affect startup time, especially in extension workflows.
requested_outcome: Add a benchmark and baseline threshold for loading common source-map sizes.
completion_criteria: Benchmark uses checked-in fixtures; regression threshold is documented; output names the affected size class.

title: Performance: add memory guardrails for large trace rendering
observed_gap: Large traces can degrade CLI, TUI, or extension rendering.
requested_outcome: Add stress tests or benchmarks for rendering large traces with bounded memory expectations.
completion_criteria: Renderer handles large traces without unbounded growth; docs mention practical limits; failures identify the rendering path.

title: Reliability: add panic boundary tests for public command handlers
observed_gap: Public commands should return structured errors rather than panicking on malformed input.
requested_outcome: Add panic-boundary tests around high-risk command handlers and malformed fixtures.
completion_criteria: Malformed inputs fail without panic; error messages identify input cause; panic hook behavior stays useful for internal bugs.

title: Reliability: add lockfile and workspace consistency checks
observed_gap: Workspace crates, examples, extension package files, and lockfiles can drift.
requested_outcome: Add CI checks that validate lockfiles and workspace package membership.
completion_criteria: Lockfile drift fails CI; docs show update commands; examples and crates stay included intentionally.

title: Performance: surface slow analyzer rules in profiling output
observed_gap: Users need to know which analyzer rules dominate runtime on large contracts.
requested_outcome: Add per-rule timing to analyzer profiling or verbose output.
completion_criteria: Timing is off or low-overhead by default; verbose/profile mode lists slow rules; tests cover output shape.

title: Reliability: add crash-safe writes for exported artifacts
observed_gap: Exported traces, snapshots, and reports should not leave corrupt final files on interruption.
requested_outcome: Write exports to temporary files and atomically rename on success where supported.
completion_criteria: Interrupted writes do not overwrite good artifacts; failures clean temp files or report them; tests cover simulated write failure.

title: Maintenance: add an issue-backlog generation script that checks duplicates before opening issues
observed_gap: Backlog-to-GitHub issue creation is currently manual and easy to duplicate.
requested_outcome: Add a maintained script that reads backlog TSV/Markdown, compares against existing issue titles/backlog ids, supports dry-run, and creates only missing issues.
completion_criteria: Dry-run reports create/skip counts; duplicate detection checks title and backlog id; docs explain the workflow.
